CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(Development_address__r.DIPA__c) = true,"Update 'Date of Initial Pricing Adjustment' on Development", HYPERLINK( "/apex/APXTConga4__Conga_Composer?serverUrl=" & $Api.Enterprise_Server_URL_370 & "&Id=" & Id & "&OFN=Vacancy+Pricing+" & Name & "&DC=" & IF( OR(ISBLANK( Date_of_Initial_Rental_Pricing__c ),Initial_rental_pricing__c=0,ISBLANK( Initial_rental_pricing__c )), "1" , "0") & "&DCL=MISSING+Initial+Pricing+OR+Date+of+Initial+Pricing&TemplateID=a291N000004G8DC&DS7=3","Click Here To Export","_blank") )
CustomField.label: Vacancy Pricing
